requirement: Biomedical/Clinical waste must be segregated at source (Yellow/Red/Black) and stored in leak-proof containers.
remedy: Implement mandatory color-coded waste segregation training and infrastructure.

requirement: On-site medical waste incinerators must meet NEMA technical specifications (99.9% combustion efficiency).
remedy: Attach technical data sheet for incinerator showing NEMA-approved scrubbers.

requirement: Effluent from medical facilities must not exceed 30mg/L BOD or 50mg/L COD before discharge into public sewer.
remedy: Install a specialized hospital Effluent Treatment Plant (ETP) with chemical neutralization.

requirement: Stack emissions for medical waste incinerators must not exceed PM limits of 50mg/Nm3.
remedy: Install baghouse filters and dry scrubbers on the incinerator stack.

requirement: Noise levels in Silent Zones (Hospitals) must not exceed 45dB (Day) and 35dB (Night).
remedy: Install acoustic enclosures for generators and implement a 'No-Honking' policy within 100m.

requirement: Provision of specialized PPE (Lead aprons, Dosimeters) for radiology and oncology staff.
remedy: Establish a Radiation Safety Program and provide certified PPE to all oncology personnel.
